'''dhanoko''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:xylography|xylography]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-n-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:xylography|xylography]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| dhanoko
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhæneketh|dhæneketh]] || [[word:dhænekej|dhænekej]] || [[word:dhænekesh|dhænekesh]] || [[word:dhæneke|dhæneke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhanonokoth|dhanonokoth]] || [[word:dhanonokoj|dhanonokoj]] || [[word:dhanonokosh|dhanonokosh]] || [[word:dhanonoko|dhanonoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhanokoth|dhanokoth]] || [[word:dhanokoj|dhanokoj]] || [[word:dhanokosh|dhanokosh]] || [[word:dhanoko|dhanoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhanofkofth|dhanofkofth]] || [[word:dhanofkofj|dhanofkofj]] || [[word:dhanofkofsh|dhanofkofsh]] || [[word:dhanofkof|dhanofkof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dhanokotho|dhanokotho]] || [[word:dhanokojo|dhanokojo]] || [[word:dhanokosho|dhanokosho]] || [[word:dhanokoko|dhanokoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dhanokoth|dhanokoth]] || [[word:dhanokoj|dhanokoj]] || [[word:dhanokosh|dhanokosh]] || [[word:dhanoko|dhanoko]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dhanokothol|dhanokothol]] || [[word:dhanokojol|dhanokojol]] || [[word:dhanokoshol|dhanokoshol]] || [[word:dhanokokol|dhanokokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dhanokoothotho|dhanokoothotho]] || [[word:dhanokoojojo|dhanokoojojo]] || [[word:dhanokooshosho|dhanokooshosho]] || [[word:dhanokooko|dhanokooko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dhanokothon|dhanokothon]] || [[word:dhanokojon|dhanokojon]] || [[word:dhanokoshon|dhanokoshon]] || [[word:dhanokokon|dhanokokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dhanokothooro|dhanokothooro]] || [[word:dhanokojooro|dhanokojooro]] || [[word:dhanokoshooro|dhanokoshooro]] || [[word:dhanokokooro|dhanokokooro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|307a66b}}
